React state + useEffect suffices at this s… QUAL User can delete a task and it is removed from both the UI and localStorage COMP 2 Module CON Tailwind CSS for all styling — no additional CSS frameworks CON Single-file React component (one .tsx file plus one optional CSS/Tailwind config… COMP 6 Module QUAL User can mark a task as complete or incomplete and the status change persists after reload COMP 3 Module CON Tailwind CSS for all styling — no additional CSS frameworks QUAL Toggling a task from done back to not-done preserves the task name and list position DEC Project scope: Personal Task Tracker CON Virtualized list (e.g., react-window or manual windowing) for rendering large ta… CON Vite as build tool CON localStorage as the sole persistence layer — no network calls CON Tailwind CSS for all styling—no additional CSS frameworks QUAL Completed tasks are visually distinct from incomplete tasks (strikethrough, opacity, or similar) QUAL Incomplete tasks appear before completed tasks for easy review of remaining work CON `dueDate?: string` and `createdAt: string` are underspecified (format, timezone,… DEC Project scope: Personal Task Tracker QUAL Task creation form and task list are both visible simultaneously without navigation or tab switching COMP 6 Module QUAL Typing a task name and submitting adds a new not-done task that appears in the list without page reload QUAL Reloading the browser page restores the exact task list that was present before reload QUAL Submitting a task
